title: 分析维度 / Dimensions
point: 现金流、净值、现有保障/投资、风险与目标匹配。 / Cash flow, net worth, cover/investments, risk-goal fit.
keyfacts: 识别盈余/缺口 / Find surpluses/shortfalls
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Analysing & Evaluating a Client’s Financial Status

title: 保障缺口 / Protection gap
point: 保障缺口=需求 − 现有保障;储蓄缺口同理。 / Protection gap = needs − existing cover.
keyfacts: 作为方案依据 / Basis for solutions
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Analysing & Evaluating a Client’s Financial Status
